## v1.0.33 — Install Addons pip path hardening

- Harden `resolveBundledScript` so Python/shell scripts never resolve inside `app.asar` when an unpacked copy exists
- Validate `install-addons-pip.py` and `scripts/lib/gpu_vendor.py` before pip install with clear upgrade errors
- Add packaging regression test for asar vs unpacked Python script resolution
- Add `scripts/audit-packaging.cjs` dev utility to audit `build.files` gaps

**If Install Addons failed on v1.0.31:** reinstall with this build — v1.0.31 resolved pip scripts inside `app.asar`, which Python cannot execute.
